## Product Principles Checklist (required)

- [ ] I read `SOUL.md`
- [ ] I used `PRODUCT-PRINCIPLES-CHECKLIST.md`
- [ ] This PR improves progression, stoke, or community
- [ ] Filters/categories/sport types remain correct
- [ ] UI keeps context → action → support hierarchy
- [ ] No backend-only raw fields exposed as primary UI
- [ ] Success metric / feedback signal is defined
